## 📋 Query Execution Strategy & De-duplication Notes

```
UNION LOGIC:
  Cohort = (
      Patients from Queries 1A or 1B or 1C or 1D  ← Diagnosis arm
    ∪ Patients from Queries 2A + 2B + 2C + 2D + 2E  ← Medication arm
    ∪ Patients from Queries 3A + 3B               ← Biomarker arm
  )
```

| Consideration | Guidance |
|---|---|
| **De-duplication** | Extract `Patient.id` from all `_include`d Patient resources; take the set union across all query results |
| **Diagnosis vs. Medication overlap** | Medication queries (esp. prednisone, MTX) will produce false positives — intersect with diagnosis queries for cleaner SLE-specific cohorts |
| **ANA titer storage format** | If your EHR stores titers as strings (`"1:160"`), Query 3A will miss them — check Observation.valueString or use `value-string` parameter instead |
| **Pagination** | Add `&_count=1000` and follow `Bundle.link[relation=next]` for large result sets |
| **Historical prescriptions** | Broaden medication status to `status=active,stopped,on-hold,completed` to capture patients who *were* on HCQ but recently discontinued (high-risk for non-adherence) |
| **`:below` modifier** | Queries 1B and 1C are cleaner alternatives to 1A/1D but require your FHIR server to support terminology subsumption (e.g., via a terminology service integration) |
